data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the transfer deadline requirement, specifically that transfers cannot occur within 24 hours of the class. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality has been implemented or tested. The linked use case mentions the transfer deadline, but there is no corresponding evidence that this requirement has been satisfied, indicating a gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the transfer deadline functionality being tested or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
